infoSolucionesPension.title: Pension solutions
infoSolucionesPension.description: Our software is designed for pension funds, insurers, and financial institutions looking to transform their management. With our platforms, you can manage severance, mandatory and voluntary pensions, and settle life annuities with full traceability, efficiency, and regulatory compliance.

metrics.description: million affiliates managed in Colombia and LATAM

metrics.value:

infoPensiones2.title: Aging population
infoPensiones2.description: More retirees demand agile and sustainable processes.

infoPensiones2.title: Financial sustainability
infoPensiones2.description: Deficits in pay-as-you-go systems drive diversification into capitalization funds.

infoPensiones2.title: Process digitalization
infoPensiones2.description: Affiliates expect self-management, traceability, and a 100% digital experience.

infoPensiones2.title: Regulatory pressure
infoPensiones2.description: Changing regulations require reliable and updated reports.

infoPensiones2.title: Pensioner payroll
infoPensiones2.description: Mass payments require transparent and error-free settlement.

infoPensiones2.title: New actors
infoPensiones2.description: Insurers and multi-funds intensify competition and raise service standards.

infoPensiones3.title: Mandatory Pensions Module
infoPensiones3.description: Manages the complete cycle of the affiliate, from design, affiliation to recognition and payment of the pension, Under different regimes and regulatory frameworks.

items.textos: Administration of affiliations, employment history, and contributions
Settlement of pensions in capitalization, pay-as-you-go, or mixed schemes.
Management of news, transfers, withdrawals, and status changes.
Integrated pensioner payroll, with massive processes and total control.
Regulatory parameterization per country and continuous update to regulatory changes.
Integration with regulatory, accounting, and collection systems.
Generation of executive and detailed reports
Designed with user experience in mind for greater ease of use.
360° view of the affiliate and employers, providing unified access to bank accounts, relationships, and obligation status.

infoPensiones3.textoFooter: We manage 48% of mandatory pensions in Colombia, representing USD 63 billion

infoPensiones3.title: Life Annuities and Pensioner Payroll Module
infoPensiones3.description: Manages the settlement and periodic payment of life annuities and pensioner payroll from a 100% web and highly automated platform.

items.textos: Automatic settlement of life annuities.
Management of survivorships, substitutions, and temporalities.
Mass processes for calculation and dispersion of payments.
Notifications to the pensioner about payments and adjustments.
Integrated document manager for auditing and traceability.
Electronic dossier, notifications, integration with document manager, upload component, and file generation.
Adapts to pension funds, insurers, and occupational risk companies, allowing you to manage both pensioner payrolls and life annuities in one place.

infoPensiones3.title: Voluntary Pensions Module
infoPensiones3.description: Manages voluntary pension savings schemes from a multi-fund logic, flexible and aimed at affiliate self-management, with a complete set of processes that Cover financial, operational, and risk management

items.textos: Administration of periodic and extraordinary contributions.
Mobility between funds according to the affiliate's risk profile.
Comprehensive management of affiliates, people, and accounts.
Financial management, valuation, and risk control associated with the funds.
Management of tax benefits in accordance with local regulations.
Self-management portals for affiliates and employers.
Regulatory, accounting, and collective contribution reports.
Operational and financial closing of the funds with full traceability.

infoPensiones3.textoFooter: We manage 43% of voluntary savings in Colombia, representing USD 5 billion

infoPensiones3.title: Severance Module
infoPensiones3.description: Administrates comprehensive severance management with high operational volumes and strict regulatory controls, from the same pension core covering affiliate management to fund calculations and legally permitted withdrawals.

items.textos: Management of partial and total withdrawals according to legal causals.
Massive settlement, transfer, and payment processes.
Multi-fund administration with additional benefits.
Integration with payroll, collection systems, and accounting.
Reduction of operational costs and improvement in contribution traceability.

informacionPensiones5.title: Regional Scale
informacionPensiones5.description: Presence in El Salvador, Bolivia, Peru, Colombia, Honduras, and other countries.

informacionPensiones5.title: Proven and expanding regional scale
informacionPensiones5.description: Platform scaling regionally, expanding into new markets such as Chile, Mexico, Dominican Republic, among others. Supporting the growth and evolution of our clients' pension business.

informacionPensiones5.title: Specialized Support
informacionPensiones5.description: Support in implementation and daily operation, backed by a team of over 200 professionals with knowledge of the pension sector, project management, and functional processes.

highlight.description: of the Colombian mandatory pension market supported by our solutions.

metrics.description: 30 years of innovation in the pension sector
High volumes with millions of monthly transactions in pensioner payroll settlement.

textoPensiones1.title: Challenges of the pension system in Latin America and how you can manage it with our software
textoPensiones1.description: The pension system in Latin America faces transformations that require vision and technology:

textoPensiones2.title: A unique, modular and scalable pension platform
textoPensiones2.description:
Our pension software centralizes the administration of the pension system in a single technological core, from which it is possible to integratedly manage mandatory pensions, voluntary pensions, severance pay, and life annuities.
Its modular and parameterizable design allows it to adapt to the regulations of each country in LATAM, handle high operational volumes, and guarantee traceability, control, and consistency of information throughout the entire pension cycle
